items.group_name: Table, view, function, and procedure objects

model.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE target_catalog.target_schema.ctas_orders_enriched AS
WITH g7h_ctas_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    customer_id,
    order_timestamp,
    total_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g7h_ctas_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    customer_id,
    CAST(order_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS order_ts,
    total_amount,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g7h_ctas_source
)
SELECT
  *
FROM g7h_ctas_enriched

items.group_name: Table, view, function, and procedure objects

model.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW target_catalog.target_schema.vw_orders_daily AS
WITH g7k_view_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    customer_id,
    CAST(order_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP) AS order_ts,
    total_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  DATE_TRUNC('DAY', order_ts) AS order_day,
  total_amount
FROM g7k_view_source

items.group_name: Table, view, function, and procedure objects

model.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE MATERIALIZED VIEW target_catalog.target_schema.mv_daily_sales AS
WITH g7n_mv_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(order_timestamp AS DATE) AS order_date,
    CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) AS total_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  order_date,
  SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales_amount,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM g7n_mv_source
GROUP BY order_date
